mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS TOTAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SOLD_YN = 'N') AS ACTIVE_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SOLD_YN = 'Y') AS SOLD_CNT

SELECT A.PROP_CD , A.PROP_NO , A.PROP_NM , A.ADDRESS , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.MID_CAT_CD) AS MID_CAT_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.SUB_CAT_CD) AS SUB_CAT_NM , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SOLD_YN , A.VIEW_CNT , A.ADMIN_MEMO , (SELECT U.USR_NM FROM TB_USR U WHERE U.USR_CD = A.CRE_USR_CD) AS CRE_USR_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.PROP_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{propNo}, '%')
ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT A.PROP_CD , A.PROP_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , A.VIEW_CNT , A.SOLD_YN FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SOLD_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND DATE(RGT_DTM) = CURDATE() ) AS TODAY_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BBS_PST R WHERE R.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND R.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND R.PST_LVL > 0 AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ) ) AS UNANSWERED_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND DATE_FORMAT(RGT_DTM, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') ) AS MONTH_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND NOTICE_YN = 'N' ) AS TOTAL_CNT

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.RGT_PHONE , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BBS_PST R WHERE R.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND R.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND R.PST_LVL > 0 AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS REPLY_YN FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REPLY_YN ASC, A.IDX DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_UPLD_FILE SET SAVE_FILE_NM = CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SAVE_FILE_NM, '.', 1), '.webp'), FILE_EXTN = 'webp' WHERE SAVE_PATH LIKE '%/property/%' AND (SAVE_FILE_NM LIKE '%.jpg' OR SAVE_FILE_NM LIKE '%.jpeg' OR SAVE_FILE_NM LIKE '%.png')

UPDATE TB_PROPERTY SET THUMB_IMG_PATH = CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(THUMB_IMG_PATH, '.', 1), '.webp') WHERE THUMB_IMG_PATH IS NOT NULL AND THUMB_IMG_PATH != '' AND (THUMB_IMG_PATH LIKE '%.jpg' OR THUMB_IMG_PATH LIKE '%.jpeg' OR THUMB_IMG_PATH LIKE '%.png')
